stop.prompt: If a .trigger/trigger.json exists in this project, read guardian.auto_review from it. If auto_review is false, do nothing. Otherwise use guardian.review_threshold_files and guardian.review_threshold_lines as thresholds (defaults: 3 files, 50 lines). Check if this turn edited that many code files or lines (excluding files matching guardian.skip_patterns). If thresholds met: read rule trigger-auto-review.mdc, then spawn a code-reviewer Task() to review the diff. Present findings inline. If no trigger.json exists, use defaults (3 files / 50 lines). If thresholds not met, do nothing.
